cli.command.config.set.about: greentic-dev config nisqapi huk llave churay (ej. defaults.component.org)
cli.command.config.set.value: Llave-man churana chanin (qillqasqa huk qillqa hina waqaychasqa)
cli.command.coverage.about: Ejecutaq cobertura qhawakuykunata coverage-policy.json nisqaman hina
cli.command.coverage.skip_run: Kaq target/coverage/coverage.json willakuyta yapamanta llamk'achiy ama musuqmanta pruebakunata purichispa
cli.command.install.token: Auth token utaq env:VAR nisqawan muyurisqa comercial churaykunapaq
cli.command.mcp.doctor.json: Sumaq rikhurichiy rantinpi compacto JSON lluqsichiy
cli.command.mcp.doctor.provider: MCP proveedor sutichiq utaq config ñan
cli.command.pack.about: Pack passthrough (greentic-pack; pack runqa greentic-runner-cli nisqata llamk'achin)
cli.command.passthrough.args: Uray kaq kamachiman chiqanta pasanapaq argumentos
cli.command.secrets.init.about: greentic-secretsman delegay huk packpaq secretos qallarinanpaq
cli.command.secrets.init.passthrough: Akllanasqa yapasqa args greentic-secretsman pasachisqa (`--` churay banderakunap ñawpaqninman)
cli.command.tools.about: Delegasqa Greentic herramientas binarias nisqakunata churay/musyachiy
cli.command.tools.install.latest: Herramientas musuq kaq versiónkunata apamunapaq wakmanta churay
cli.command.wizard.allow_destructive: Planpa huk pasos mañakusqanman hina chinkachiy/sapanmanta qillqay/kuyuchiy hina qhapaq ruwaykunata saqiy
cli.command.wizard.emit_answers: Portable AnswerDocument envelope JSON willayta lluqsichiy
cli.command.wizard.locale: Locale (BCP47), proveedoresman pasasqa hinaspa plan metadata nisqapi qillqasqa
cli.command.wizard.migrate: Munasqa kaptin AnswerDocument akllasqa schema versiónman migray
cli.command.wizard.non_interactive: Mana interactivo contexto nisqakunapi ejecuciónta saqiy
cli.command.wizard.schema: Kunan kaq launcher AnswerDocument esquema-ta qillqay hinaspa lluqsiy
cli.command.wizard.schema_long:
Kunan kaq launcher AnswerDocument esquema-ta qillqay hinaspa lluqsiy.

Codex hinallataq Claude hina agentic coding herramientasqa kayta ñawpaqta waqyananku tiyan exacto greentic-dev launcher contrato jap'inankupaq, chaypi embedded greentic-pack hinallataq greentic-bundle answer esquemakuna delegacionpaq llamk'achisqa kasqankuta ima.
cli.command.wizard.unsafe_commands: Ñawpaq run-command allowlist nisqamanta hawapi kamachikunata saqiy
cli.install.error.absolute_doc_path: absoluto doc churana ñankuna mana saqisqachu
cli.install.error.doc_id_requires_url: doc id `{id}` nisqaqa manifest URLta munan; sapallan IDkunaqa greentic-devpi mana yanapasqachu
cli.install.error.doc_manifest_mismatch: doc manifest mana tupanchu: tenantqa `{expected_id}` nisqata rimarqan ichaqa manifestqa `{actual_id}` nisqata apamurqan
cli.install.error.doc_path_escape: doc churana ñanqa docs qillqakuna qhatu ukhullapi kiparinan tiyan
cli.install.error.empty_token_non_intera: ch'usaq token, mana ima interactive terminalpas kanchu
cli.install.error.env_token_resolve: env var {var} allichayqa pantarqan install tokenpaq
cli.install.error.github_only_assets: GitHubpi waqaychasqa assetllakunan yanapasqa, `{host}` chaskisqa karqan
cli.install.error.missing_token_non_inte: token pisin, mana ima interactive terminalpas kanchu
cli.install.error.tenant_manifest_mismat: tenant OCI manifest mana tupanchu: mañakusqa `{tenant}` karqan ichaqa manifestqa `{manifest_tenant}` nisqata apamurqan
cli.install.error.tenant_manifest_not_fo: tenant manifestqa mana tarikurqachu `{reference}`pi. Qhaway tenant slug allin kasqanta chaymanta OCI artifact `latest` sutiyuqwan publicarqaku kasqanta.
cli.install.error.tool_id_requires_url: tool id `{id}` nisqaqa manifest URLta munan; sapallan IDkunaqa greentic-devpi mana yanapasqachu
cli.install.error.tool_manifest_mismatch: tool manifest mana tupanchu: tenantqa `{expected_id}` nisqata rimarqan ichaqa manifestqa `{actual_id}` nisqata apamurqan
cli.install.error.unsupported_doc_source: doc `{id}` nisqaqa mana yanapasqa source type `{source_type}` nisqayuqmi
cli.install.error.unsupported_tool_insta: tool `{id}` nisqaqa mana yanapasqa install type `{install_type}` nisqayuqmi
cli.option.locale: Simi suyupi (BCP47) tikrasqa CLI yanapayninpaq maypicha yanapasqa kashan
cli.wizard.error.interactive_required: wizard launcher nisqaqa interactive yaykuyta munan. Kayta apachiy: `wizard --answers <FILE>`, `wizard apply --answers <FILE>`, utaq `wizard validate --answers <FILE>`.
cli.wizard.error.invalid_selection: mana allin akllay; 1 utaq 2 suyasqa karqan
cli.wizard.launcher.title: Greentic Desarrollador Yanapaq
runtime.passthrough.error.binary_not_fou: `{name}` PATH nisqapi mana tarikurqanchu; {env_key} churay, `{name}` cargo binstallwan churay, utaq `greentic-dev install tools` purichiy (`--latest` kallpachay-musuqyachinapaq)
runtime.tools.install.error.install_bins: cargo-binstall churayqa pantarqan; `cargo install cargo-binstall --locked` lluqsiy codice {exit_code}
runtime.tools.install.warn.latest_check_: greentic-dev: qhipa `cargo-binstall` versión qhawayqa pantarqan ({error}); churasqa versión {installed_version}wanraq qatipachkan.
runtime.wizard.confirm.error.non_interac: mana interactivo modopi takyachiy mana kaspaqa ejecuciónqa mana saqisqachu. Wakmanta purichiy `--execute --yes` utaq `--execute --non-interactive` nisqawan.
runtime.wizard.executor.error.command_no: kamachi `{program}` ñawpaqmantapacha mana saqisqachu; saqinapaq --unsafe-commands nisqawan llamk'achiy
runtime.wizard.executor.error.destructiv: planqa qhapaq ruwaykunata mañakurqan; wakmanta purichiy --allow-destructive nisqawan
runtime.wizard.executor.error.replay_pin: replay pin mana tupanchu {program}paq: suyashqa {expected}, chaskishqa {actual}
runtime.wizard.executor.error.unsafe_arg: kamachi `{program}` hark'asqa shell-hina argumentosniyuq; ejecutayta mana munanchu
